The "US Government Firewall Virus" is a malicious piece of software that infects computers and can cause a variety of problems, including redirecting web browsers to unauthorized websites, slowing down computer performance, and even allowing hackers to access your system. If your computer has been infected with this virus, it's important to take steps to remove it as soon as possible.

To remove the "US Government Firewall Virus" from your computer, follow these steps:

1. Disconnect your computer from the Internet. This will prevent the virus from spreading to other computers on your network.

2. Boot your computer into Safe Mode. This will prevent the virus from being able to load itself into memory and cause more damage.

3. Open the Task Manager and end any processes that are associated with the virus.

4. Delete any files or folders that are associated with the virus.

5. Scan your computer with an antivirus program. This will help to detect and remove any remaining traces of the virus.

6. Reconnect your computer to the Internet and restart it.

7. Run a full virus scan with your antivirus program. This will help to detect and remove any remaining traces of the virus.

Enhancing your understanding of different religions can help you improve your spirituality and be more accepting of people with different beliefs. Read on to learn how to enhance your understanding of different religions.

Find a religion that resonates with you. To get started, think about your core beliefs. For example, do you believe in one God? Do you believe that Jesus was divine? If you can answer these questions easily, then you have a starting point. If not, then you need to do some research. You can start by reading the Wikipedia article on your religion. Then, you can read a book or two on your religion. Once you have a basic understanding of your religion, you can move on to other religions.

Read a book about a different religion. After you have a basic understanding of your own religion, you can read a book about a different religion. You might want to start with a book about the religion you know the least about. For example, if you are a Christian, you might want to read a book about Islam. Once you have finished the book, you can take a moment to reflect on what you have read.

 Consider your spiritual beliefs. Once you have read a book about a different religion, you can consider your spiritual beliefs. What do you believe in? What do you value? What is important to you? If you have a hard time answering these questions, then you might want to read a book about your own religion.

The Game of Life comes with many cardboard parts that you will need to punch out and attach to the board. It also comes with some plastic pieces that you will need to attach to the board in the correct places., Your Game of Life set should have stickers for the mountain and bridge pieces. Put these stickers on the mountain and bridge pieces before you attach them to the game board., Before you start playing, you will need to assemble the board. Attach the buildings, mountains, and bridges to the correct places on the board. Each plastic piece has a letter on it that matches up with a letter on the board.Match the letter piece with the correct letter on the board. For example, the “J” piece should go into the “J” slot.

, The Game of Life uses a spinner instead of dice. You will need to put this spinner together and attach it to the board before you play your first game. Punch out the cardboard spinner and match the notches up with the notches on the plastic spinner dial. Then, snap the two pieces together.Next attach the spinner dial to the spinner base. The spinner base should have a letter on it that corresponds to the letter on the board. Snap the assembled spinner into place on the board.

, Make sure that they are all facing down. Mix them up and leave them next to the board to act as the draw pile. Take four tiles without looking at them and place them on the Millionaire Estates space., The four types of cards are Career Cards, Salary Cards, House Deeds, and Stocks. Make sure that you keep each type of card separate and then shuffle each stack. Place the stacks face-down somewhere next to the board where everyone can reach them., Place these items somewhere near the board. Players will purchase and borrow these items throughout the game, so you will want to have them somewhere that is easy to access. Select a spot right next to the game board to keep these items for when they are needed., The Banker is in charge of all money going into and out of the bank. Make sure the person who decides to be the Banker is aware that he/she will need to collect and distribute money throughout the game. The Banker will need to distribute $10,000 in Life money to each player., The Game of Life comes with six car movers in different colors as well as people pegs that go in the cars. Make sure that every player chooses a car and puts a peg into it before placing that peg on the board., Before your first turn, you will need to decide if you want to start the game with a career card or start the game by going to college. There are advantages and disadvantages to both options.The advantages of starting your career right away is that you will start earning PAY DAY money sooner and you will not have any debt. The disadvantages of starting your career right away is that you will not earn as much money and there are some career cards that you may not take.
The advantage of going to college is that you will earn more when you do get a career card. The disadvantage of going to college is that you will have $40,000 in debt and it will take you longer to get your career card.

, If you choose to start a career, then you will need to choose a career card right away. Discard any career cards that indicate that a college degree is required, such as the doctor career card., If you are going to start college, then you will need to place your car on the start college space. You may not draw a career card yet. You may draw a career card when you reach the Job Search space., Each play will need to spin the wheel at the beginning of every turn. The number that you spin will indicate how many spaces you may move your car on the board. You may only move your car forward, not backwards on the board., The Game of Life board is very colorful and each space has different instructions that you will need to read and follow. Take some time to review the basic instructions for the space colors so that you will know what your options are.Orange spaces have instructions written on them that you must follow.
Blue spaces have instructions on them that you may decide to follow or not follow.
Green spaces are PAY DAY spaces. Collect the amount shown on your PAY DAY card whenever you pass or land on a green space.
Red spaces require you to stop moving, even if you have enough moves left to go past a red space. You have to stop whenever you encounter a red space. Follow the instructions on the space, then spin and move again.

, The career spaces on the board match the available career cards. If one of your opponents owns the card, then you need to pay that opponent the amount shown on the card.If you own the career card, then you do not have to pay anything.
If no one owns the career card, then you need to pay the amount indicated on the space to the bank.

, This rule is known as the Special Police Officer Rule. If someone spins a 10, then that person is said to have been “speeding” and must pay whoever has the Police Officer career card $5,000. If no one has the card, then no one has to pay., The accountant gets an extra space on the board which is called the Taxes space. If you land on this space, then you need to pay $5,000 to whoever has the accountant career card.If no one has this card, then pay $5,000 to the bank.
If you have the card, then you pay nothing.

, You may choose to purchase an insurance policy at the beginning of one of your turns. These policies will offer some protection for your home or car (depending on which one you buy) in case of an accident.Auto insurance costs $10,000, but the homeowner’s insurance policies depend on the home that you own. You can find the cost of a homeowner’s insurance policy on your deed card.

, You may buy a stock card at the beginning of one of your turns. A stock card costs $50,000, but if someone spins and lands on the number on your card, then you collect $10,000 from the bank. This rule applies whether you are spinning or someone else is spinning.You may only buy one stock card, but you may get another stock card if you land on the Stock Market Zooms space.

, If you are running low on cash, then you may take out a bank loan of $20,000 at the beginning of one of your turns. Keep in mind that you will have to repay this amount to the bank when you retire plus an extra $5,000 in interest., When you have reached the Retire space, you may not spin the wheel any more or draw cards, or purchase things. This space indicates that you are near the end of the game. However, getting to the Retire space first does not mean you have won the game., The first thing you will need to do when you hit the Retire space is to repay any loans you have taken out plus the interest that you owe. Put this money back into the bank., Next, get rid of all of your special cards, but you may keep your stocks. If you are ahead of your opponents, then you can continue to collect money from your stocks when your opponents spin the wheel., Move to Millionaire Estates if you think that you have the most money. Keep in mind that if you do move to Millionaire Estates, you stand a chance to collect four additional Life tiles that may help you win the game. But other players may draw from this pile if the draw deck is empty.If you move to Countryside Acres, collect one Life tile. No one may take this Life tile from you and you may include it in your cash total at the end of the game.

, The player with the most money gets the last four life tiles that are on the Millionaire Estates space. Then, all of the players (including those at Countryside Acres) should add the cash amounts on their Life tiles with the money they have on hand. The player with the most money is the winner!

If you have to make an emergency landing, you need to prepare yourself and the airplane for the landing. This is especially important in a rough or crash landing, as the airplane can be damaged or you can be injured. Follow the steps below to prepare for and exit a Cessna 172 in the event of a crash landing.

Fasten your seatbelt during the entire flight. Keep the shoulder strap on, and make sure that the lap belt is securely fastened. This will keep you from being thrown around the cabin during the landing.

Prepare for the landing. Look for a spot to land that is free of obstacles, such as trees, buildings, and power lines. Make sure you are clear of the airport, if possible. Close the window shades and tray tables to prevent them from opening during the landing.

Get ready to exit the airplane. Count to three to allow the airplane to come to a complete stop. Do not unfasten your seatbelt until you are ready to exit the airplane. Make sure the area around you is clear of debris and obstacles.

Exit the airplane. Follow the same steps you would use to exit the airplane during a normal landing. However, be aware that the airplane may be damaged or the environment may be hazardous.

How to Install Baseboard Heating (Electric)
Wiring an electric baseboard is a fairly simple operation, and can usually be performed by any DIYer with a working knowledge of electricity and heating systems. This article will walk you through the steps necessary to install or wire an electric baseboard heater, and provide you with a list of the tools and materials you will need to get the job done.

Gather your materials and tools.
You will need an electric baseboard heater, a power supply cable, a wall thermostat, and a floor thermostat. You will also need a few basic tools, including a drill, a screwdriver, and a wrench.

Plan your installation.
You will need to determine the location of the electric baseboard heater, as well as the location of the wall and floor thermostats. Make sure that the heater will be installed in a location where it will not be exposed to moisture or physical damage.

Drill holes for the wiring.
You will need to drill holes in the wall behind the electric baseboard heater in order to run the power supply cable and the thermostat wiring to the heater. Make sure that the holes are drilled in a safe location and are large enough to accommodate the necessary wiring.

Connect the power supply cable to the heater.
Connect one end of the power supply cable to the electric baseboard heater. Make sure that the cable is properly secured to the heater and that there are no exposed wires.

Connect the other end of the power supply cable to the wall outlet or breaker box. Make sure that the connection is secure and that there are no exposed wires.

Connect the thermostat wiring to the heater.
Connect the two wires from the wall thermostat to the electric baseboard heater. Make sure that the wires are properly secured to the heater and that there are no exposed wires.

Connect the two wires from the floor thermostat to the electric baseboard heater. Make sure that the wires are properly secured to the heater and that there are no exposed wires.

Test the installation.
Once you have connected all of the necessary wiring to the electric baseboard heater, you should test the installation to make sure that it is properly connected and functioning correctly.

How to Make Rainbow Cookies

Rainbow cookies are a fun and easy dessert to make for a St. Patrick's Day celebration. These colorful cookies are also a great treat for a birthday party or a potluck. Here is a simple recipe for rainbow cookies that will be a hit with everyone.

Ingredients:

1/2 cup all-purpose flour
1/2 teaspoon baking powder
1/4 teaspoon salt
2 cups miniature marshmallows
1/2 cup milk
1/3 cup unsalted butter
2 cups sugar
2 large eggs
2 teaspoons vanilla extract
6 drops of red food coloring
6 drops of orange food coloring
6 drops of yellow food coloring

Steps:

1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
2. In a small bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and salt. Set aside.
3. In a large bowl, combine marshmallows and milk. Set aside.
4. In a separate large bowl, beat together butter and sugar until fluffy. Beat in eggs and vanilla.
5. Beat in dry ingredients until just combined. Do not overmix.
6. Divide batter into 6 bowls. Add 1 drop of red food coloring to 1 bowl, 1 drop of orange to another bowl, and 1 yellow to the last bowl. Stir to combine.
7. Transfer each color to a separate piping bag or sandwich bag.
8. Pipe each color into a lined cupcake pan, alternating colors.
9. Bake cookies for 10-12 minutes, or until they are just set.
10. Let cookies cool in pan for a few minutes, then transfer to a wire rack to cool completely.

How to Increase Progesterone Levels

It is possible to increase progesterone levels naturally. The following are some ways to boost progesterone levels:

1. Lose weight

Excess body fat can increase the levels of the hormone estrogen, which can affect the balance between estrogen and progesterone. Maintaining a healthy weight can help keep the balance between these hormones.

2. Exercise regularly

Regular exercise can help improve hormone levels. It also helps improve mood, boost energy levels, and improve sleep quality.

3. Reduce stress levels

High stress levels can affect hormone levels. Find ways to relax, such as through meditation, yoga, or deep breathing exercises.

4. Get enough sleep

Adequate sleep is important for hormone production. Make sure to get 7-9 hours of quality sleep each night.

5. Eat a healthy diet

Eating a healthy diet can help support hormone production. Include plenty of fruits, vegetables, whole grains, and healthy fats in your diet.

6. Avoid certain supplements and herbs

Some supplements and herbs can interfere with hormone production. Avoid supplements containing zinc, magnesium, or vitamin B6, as these can lower progesterone levels. Also, avoid using St. John's wort or other herbs that can affect hormone levels.

7. Consider natural progesterone supplements

Some people choose to take natural progesterone supplements to help boost levels. Natural progesterone supplements are available in capsule, cream, or oil form.

It is important to note that while these natural methods can help support progesterone levels, they may not be effective for everyone. If you have concerns about your hormone levels or are experiencing symptoms of low progesterone, speak with a healthcare professional for proper diagnosis and treatment.

The New York State Museum is an incredible resource for learning about the history of New York, from its geology to its art. Plan your visit to this fascinating museum in Albany with these tips.

Understand what the museum offers. The New York State Museum is actually a series of interconnected museums, each covering a different aspect of state history. Find out more about what the museum has to offer, and what you'd like to see most, by visiting the museum's website.

Look for discount admission. You may be able to find a discount for your visit to the museum. For example, some New York State residents can visit the museum for free on the first Saturday of every month. Visitors with disabilities can also enter for free with a companion. 

Buy tickets online. If you're visiting the museum from another country, you'll need to buy your tickets online before you visit. You can choose a specific day and time for your visit, and print out your tickets at home.

Arrive early. The New York State Museum is a popular destination, so you'll want to arrive early in the day to avoid crowds. The museum opens at 9:00am every day except for Thanksgiving and Christmas.

Plan to spend several hours at the museum. The New York State Museum has a lot to offer, so you'll want to set aside a large block of time for your visit. If you're particularly interested in a certain section of the museum, you might even want to visit more than once.

Dress comfortably. You'll be doing a lot of walking and standing during your visit, so wear comfortable shoes and clothes.

Plan your route. Make a list of the exhibits you most want to see so you can plan your route through the museum. This will help you make the most of your time there.

Take a break. The New York State Museum is quite large, so you'll want to take a break during your visit. There are several places to eat and drink in the museum, as well as a kids' play area.

Check out the gift shop. You can find unique and interesting items in the museum's gift shop, from books to jewelry. If you're looking for a souvenir of your visit to Albany, you'll find plenty of options here.

A business plan is a document that helps you to understand your business and your market. It also helps you to get funding from investors or lenders. A good business plan will include a description of your business, a market analysis, a financial analysis, and a marketing plan.

To create a business plan for kids, start by understanding the basics of the business. This includes knowing what the business will do, how it will make money, and who its customers will be. Once this information is gathered, it's time to start writing the plan.

How to Become a Personal Injury Attorney

Personal injury attorneys are lawyers who specialize in bringing lawsuits against negligent businesses or individuals on behalf of an injured party. They work to get their clients the money they deserve for their medical bills, pain and suffering, lost wages, and other expenses.

Education

In the United States, personal injury lawyers are licensed by the state in which they practice. Most states require a four-year college degree, followed by three years of law school. After passing the bar exam, a lawyer must be licensed by the state's highest court.

Some states have additional requirements, such as passing a background check or completing a certain number of hours of continuing education.

Training

Personal injury attorneys typically receive on-the-job training from more experienced lawyers. This may include observing cases in court, conducting legal research, and drafting documents.

They may also receive training in how to interview clients, how to negotiate with insurance companies, and how to work with expert witnesses.

Employment

Personal injury attorneys work in a variety of settings, including law firms, solo practices, and government agencies. Some work on a contingency basis, meaning they only get paid if they win the case.

Others work on an hourly basis, with a set fee for each hour of work. A few work on a hybrid basis, with a mix of hourly fees and contingency fees.

Job Outlook

The job outlook for personal injury attorneys is positive, with a projected growth rate of 10 percent between 2014 and 2024. This growth is due in part to an increase in the number of people who are injured in accidents each year.

There is also a growing trend toward plaintiffs' personal injury attorneys taking on more cases. This means that there will be an increase in the number of personal injury attorneys, as well as an increase in the number of people who are able to afford to hire them.

Mortar is a mixture of water, cement, and sand. It is often used as a binding agent when building with bricks, but it can also be used on its own as a building material. When mixed, it has a consistency like thick paint. If you find yourself in need of a lot of mortar, you can save yourself some time and energy by mixing it in a larger batch. Here's how to mix mortar in a large batch.

Determine the water-to-cement ratio. The water-to-cement ratio is the ratio of the amount of water you use to the amount of cement you use. It's typically expressed as a decimal, like 5:1 or 4:1. The higher the ratio, the more fluid the mortar will be, and the lower the ratio, the thicker the mortar will be.

For example, a mixture of 4 parts water to 1 part cement will be much thicker than a mixture of 2 parts water to 1 part cement.

If you're not sure what ratio to use, start with a 4:1 ratio and adjust it up or down depending on the consistency you want.

 Gather your ingredients. To mix mortar, you'll need water, cement, and sand. The amount of each ingredient you'll need depends on the size of your batch. For a small batch, you might only need a cup or two of each ingredient. For a larger batch, you might need a whole bag of cement and several cups of sand.

Make sure all of your ingredients are clean and free of debris. The sand should be dry and free of dirt or other particles.

Water is a key ingredient in mortar, so it's important to use clean, potable water.

The cement should be fresh and not expired.

Put on safety gear. When working with cement, it's important to wear gloves, a mask, and eye protection. Cement can irritate the skin and eyes, and it can be very messy.

Make sure you're working in a well-ventilated area.

Mix the mortar. In a large container, like a wheelbarrow or a trough, mix together the water, cement, and sand. Use a shovel or a hoe to mix everything together. Make sure all of the ingredients are well combined and that there are no lumps.

The mixture should be thick, like a thick paint or a thick soup. If it's too thick to mix, add a little more water.

Use a trowel or a wooden board to scrape the sides of the container to make sure all of the ingredients are mixed.

Let the mortar sit for a few minutes to allow the ingredients to fully combine.

Use the mortar. Once the mortar is mixed, you can use it immediately or let it sit until you need it. If you're using it immediately, transfer it to a smaller container, like a bucket or a wheelbarrow, for easy handling.

If you're not using it right away, cover the container with a damp cloth or a plastic bag to keep the mortar from drying out.

A line chart is the best option for this type of information because it would allow you to clearly see the correlation between the number of words and the length of the verses.

How to Write a Letter to Your Penpal

When you are writing a letter to your penpal, follow these steps:

1. Introduce yourself
2. Mention where you live
3. Ask questions about their life
4. Write about your interests
5. Ask for a picture
6. Write your address
7. Sign your name

If you'd like to have a penpal, you can find one on a website like PenPal World. Once you find someone you'd like to write to, follow the steps below to write a letter:

1. Introduce yourself
Let your penpal know who you are by writing a short introduction at the beginning of the letter. Write 1-2 paragraphs about yourself, where you live, what you like to do, and other facts you'd like to share.

2. Mention where you live
In the next section of your letter, write about where you live. You can talk about the city or town you live in, what you like about it, what you don't like about it, what you do for fun, and anything else you'd like to share.

3. Ask questions about their life
This is your chance to get to know your penpal! Ask questions about their life, such as what they like to do for fun, what their favorite foods are, what their favorite hobbies are, and other questions you'd like to know.

4. Write about your interests
Write a section about what you like to do for fun. You can talk about your favorite hobbies, what you like to read, what you like to watch, and anything else you'd like to share.

5. Ask for a picture
If you'd like to see what your penpal looks like, ask for a picture! You can include a self-portrait, a picture of your pet, or any other photo you'd like to share.

6. Write your address
Make sure your penpal knows how to reach you by writing your address in the upper right corner of the letter. Include your name, address, city, state, zip code, and phone number.

7. Sign your name
End your letter by signing your name.

How to Play UNO

UNO is a fun and easy-to-play card game for kids and adults. The objective is to be the first player to get rid of all your cards. To play UNO, you need a standard 52-card deck of cards, with one designated card as the UNO card. The UNO card is usually the card with the most red on it, but you can choose whatever card you want.

The game is played in a circle with each player's cards facing the center of the circle. The youngest player should go first. Every player takes turns either drawing one card from the center pile or playing one card from their hand to the center pile. When a player plays a card that matches the card on top of the center pile, the pile is "broken" and the player must take an additional card from the center pile.

If a player cannot take an additional card, they must play a card from their hand that does not break the pile. If they have no such card, they must pass. If a player does break the pile, they must take the entire pile. The pile is placed in front of the player, and their turn is over.

Once a player runs out of cards, the game is over. All remaining cards are given to the last player with cards.

 understand the assignment. Ask your child to explain the assignment to you. Does he understand what he needs to do? If he can explain the assignment in his own words, he is more likely to complete it.

 Stay involved. Check in with your child while he is doing homework to make sure he is on track. Offer support and guidance as needed.

With patience and persistence, you can help your child get his homework done. Finding the right approach for your child will make homework a breeze.

How to Deal With Your Period at School

Waking up in the morning, getting dressed, and discovering that your period has come can be a daunting experience. It can be especially hard if you're not prepared. So, if you're on your period, follow these steps to get through the day.

Step 1: See if you have any pads or tampons.
Every girl is different, so you might start your period every day, once every two or three days, or once a week. Regardless, it's always good to be prepared. The best way to be prepared is to keep some supplies in your purse, backpack, or locker. These supplies should include at least one pad and one tampon.
If you don't have any supplies on you, then you'll have to borrow some.

Step 2: Get a pad or tampon from the bathroom or from a friend.
The bathroom is the best place to go for a pad or tampon. Most schools keep extra supplies in the bathroom. If your school doesn't have extra supplies, then try to borrow some from a friend. Just remember to always use a clean pad or tampon, so try not to use one that's been opened already.

Step 3: Remove your pad or tampon at the end of the day.
When you get home from school, make sure to remove your pad or tampon and throw it away. If you're using a pad, just fold it in half and throw it away. If you're using a tampon, you should remove it and throw it away. Don't forget to also wash your hands after you're done.

Step 4: Have a pad or tampon on you at all times.
The next day, make sure you have a pad or tampon on you at all times. This way, if your period starts again, you'll be prepared.

If you start your period at school, you should always try to be prepared. This means having a pad or tampon on you at all times. You should also know where the extra supplies are in your school. This way, if you do start your period and you're not prepared, you know where to go.

How to Teach or Learn Math, Trig and XL with Enthusiasm

 Math can be a difficult subject to master, but with the right tools and a positive attitude, anyone can improve their math skills. Whether you're a student trying to better understand a difficult concept or a teacher looking for ways to engage your students, here are some tips to help you teach or learn math, trig, and XL with enthusiasm.

Set clear goals and expectations: Determine what you want to achieve or what you want your students to achieve. Having specific goals can help you stay focused and motivated.

Find a comfortable learning environment: Choose a quiet, private location where you won't be distracted. Make sure you have all the necessary materials, such as textbooks, notes, and calculators.

Connect math to real-life situations: Use examples from everyday life to help you better understand the concepts you're learning. This can make math more relatable and relevant to your life.

Use visual aids: Whether it's diagrams, charts, or graphs, visual aids can help you better understand complex math concepts.

Break down problems into smaller steps: Math problems can be intimidating, but breaking them down into smaller steps can make them more manageable. Start by identifying the problem's key components, then work through each step one at a time.

Practice regularly: Regular practice is key to improving math skills. Set aside time each day to work through math problems, either on your own or with a study group.

Stay positive and don't be afraid to ask for help: Math can be frustrating, but try to stay positive and don't get discouraged if you don't understand something right away. Ask for help from your teacher, a tutor, or a friend.

Use technology and online resources: There are many apps, websites, and online resources available to help you learn math, trig, and XL. Take advantage of these resources to supplement your learning.

Collaborate with others: Math is a subject that can be better understood when you work with others. Find a study group or work with a tutor to help you better understand the concepts you're learning.

By following these tips, you can make math, trig, and XL more enjoyable and successful for yourself or your students. With practice, patience, and the right tools, anyone can improve their math skills and gain a better understanding of these complex subjects.

How to Build a Model Pirate Ship With Polyurethane Foam

Building a model pirate ship with polyurethane foam is a three-step process. First, you'll need to create the shape of the ship's hull. Then, you'll add details such as the deck, the forecastle, and the stern. Finally, you'll paint and decorate the ship to look like a real pirate ship.

Step 1: Create the Hull
1. Draw the shape of the ship's hull on a piece of paper. This will be your template.
2. Cut out the template and trace it onto a piece of polyurethane foam.
3. Cut out the hull shape from the foam.
4. Use a hobby knife to smooth the edges of the hull.

Step 2: Add Details
1. Draw a line down the center of the hull, from front to back. This will be the location of the deck.
2. Draw the shape of the deck on either side of the center line.
3. Cut out the deck shapes from the foam.
4. Glue the decks to the hull.
5. Add details such as the forecastle and the stern.

Step 3: Paint and Decorate
1. Prime the ship with a layer of white primer.
2. Paint the ship with a layer of black paint.
3. Use a dry-brush technique to add details such as wood grain and metal.
4. Decorate the ship with flags, jewels, and other details.

How to Use Windows Movie Maker

Movie Maker is a simple video editing program that comes with Microsoft Windows. Although it is no longer available in Windows 10, you can still download it and use it on your computer. This article will teach you how to use Windows Movie Maker.

Getting Started

The first time you open Movie Maker, you'll be asked to choose which type of movies you want to create. You can choose from "Coming Soon", "Photo Slide Show", "Bird's Eye View", or "Sandbox".
For this article, we'll be creating a Bird's Eye View.

Adding Videos

Click the Add Videos and Photos button in the upper-right corner of the window.

Select the videos and photos you want to add to your movie.
You can add videos and photos from your computer or other devices, such as cameras and phones.

Adding Music

Click the Add Music button in the upper-right corner of the window.

Select the music you want to add to your movie.
You can add music from your computer or other devices, such as phones and tablets.

Changing Music

If you want to change the music in your movie, you can click the Music icon in the timeline at the bottom of the window.

This will bring up the Music Properties window, where you can select a new piece of music or adjust the volume of the current music.

When you're done, click OK.

Adding Narration

If you want to add narration to your movie, you can click the Narration icon in the timeline at the bottom of the window.

This will bring up the Narration Properties window, where you can record or import a narration track to add to your movie.

When you're done, click OK.

Changing Narration

If you want to change the narration in your movie, you can click the Narration icon in the timeline at the bottom of the window.

This will bring up the Narration Properties window, where you can record or import a new narration track to add to your movie.

When you're done, click OK.

Changing the Background Music

If you want to change the background music in your movie, you can click the Background Music icon in the timeline at the bottom of the window.

This will bring up the Background Music Properties window, where you can select a new piece of music or adjust the volume of the current music.

When you're done, click OK.

Adding Title Slides

If you want to add a title slide to your movie, you can click the Title Slide icon in the timeline at the bottom of the window.

This will bring up the Title Slide Properties window, where you can enter the title text and choose a title style.

When you're done, click OK.

Changing Title Slides

If you want to change the title slide in your movie, you can click the Title Slide icon in the timeline at the bottom of the window.

This will bring up the Title Slide Properties window, where you can enter new title text and choose a new title style.

When you're done, click OK.

Adding Transitions

If you want to add transitions to your movie, you can click the Transition icon in the timeline at the bottom of the window.

This will bring up the Transition Properties window, where you can select a transition style.

When you're done, click OK.

Changing Transitions

If you want to change the transitions in your movie, you can click the Transition icon in the timeline at the bottom of the window.

This will bring up the Transition Properties window, where you can select a new transition style.

When you're done, click OK.

Adding Effects

If you want to add effects to your movie, you can click the Effect icon in the timeline at the bottom of the window.

This will bring up the Effect Properties window, where you can select an effect style.

When you're done, click OK.

Changing Effects

If you want to change the effects in your movie, you can click the Effect icon in the timeline at the bottom of the window.

This will bring up the Effect Properties window, where you can select a new effect style.

When you're done, click OK.

Saving Your Movie

Once you're happy with your movie, you can save it.

Click the Save Movie button in the upper-right corner of the window.

Enter a name and location for your movie, and click Save.

Your movie will be saved as a WMV file.

In order to get into law school, you first need a bachelor’s degree (4 year degree) from an accredited college or university. It does not matter what kind of bachelor’s degree you get, but most pre-law students obtain bachelor’s degrees in political science, psychology, or sociology.


Make sure the school you choose is accredited. To ensure that the school you choose is accredited, check the U.S. Department of Education’s (“DOE”) Database of Accredited Postsecondary Institutions and Programs for a listing.
You do not need to major in “criminal justice” as an undergraduate. In fact, criminal justice majors are admitted to law schools are admitted at a lower rate than those who majored in journalism, philosophy, or economics.Although you will not be penalized for majoring in criminal justice, there is no automatic benefit in law school admissions for having done so.;
, One of the most important skills you will need as an attorney is the confidence to speak in front of anyone. Personal injury lawyers are often in court, addressing judges and juries, so you should begin to develop this skill while in college. Join debate or public speaking clubs.


You will also want to strengthen your research and writing skills, so you should take classes that allow you to write long research papers.

, Not everyone gets into law school. To increase your chances of getting in, keep your grades up. You want to graduate with at least a 3.0, but of course a 3.5 or 4.0 would be even better. Admissions committees view a high GPA as an indicator that you are a hard worker who is self-motivated.The higher your undergraduate GPA, the more selective you can be about what schools to apply to. Even if you do not care about the rank of the law school you attend, a higher GPA makes scholarships easier to get.

, When you apply to law school, you will need to submit letters of recommendation. Make the most of your four years in college by building relationships with professors who can write you strong recommendations.


A great way to build relationships with faculty is to work as a research or teaching assistant.

, Many small law firms need clerical and support staff assistance in the summer but also throughout the year. You can work part-time for a personal injury attorney as you work toward your undergraduate degree. Doing so will give you a taste of what being a personal injury attorney is like.

, The LSAT is by far the most important part of your application, and you will need a score around the 50 percentile in order to get into an accredited law school.


Because of the recent decline in law school applicants, law schools are giving away more scholarships than ever before. A high LSAT will help you qualify for free money from your law school of choice., The LSAT is offered four times a year, in June, September, December, and February. It is offered on Saturdays, but there are special sessions for those who observe a Saturday Sabbath.Create a free account at the Law School Admission Counsel’s (“LSAC”) website.
Find a test date and location. To do this, start on LSAC’s Law School Admission Counsel’s website Dates and Deadlines page.

, The LSAT may be the most important factor in your law school application, so take it seriously. It tests reading comprehension, analytical reasoning, and logical reasoning.Test prep companies offer tutoring, but you can also study on your own.


Your local library or bookstore should have copies of old LSAT exams. Find the most recent to take as practice exams.

, The LSAT has five multiple choice sections and one unscored essay. Four of the five multiple choice sections count toward your score. The fifth is experimental and does not count toward your score. Unfortunately, you will not know in advance which section is experimental.


Follow the rules for test day very carefully. If you fail to follow any of the test day rules, you may not be allowed to take the test. A complete set of test day rules can be found on the LSAC’s website on its Day of the test webpage.

, Applicants are allowed to take the exam more than once. Schools may choose to accept your higher score, or they may choose to average the two. If you take the LSAT twice but your score doesn’t improve, you should reconsider before taking it a third time.


On average, test takers are able to increase their score only two to three points on a re-take., Law schools are full of students who sign up thinking that law is an easy way to make big money when in reality there is nothing easy about it. Lawyers (including defense lawyers) work long hours, cope with stress, and struggle to get along with opposing counsel, clients, bosses, and judges.


Now might be a good time to think about how you will finance your legal education. The cost of a legal education has exploded in the past decade. Students routinely pay over $30,000 a year in tuition alone, which does not include additional costs for living expenses.If you are not careful, you could graduate law school $200,000 in debt.
The dramatic rise in tuition coincides with a slow-down in hiring of attorneys. According to the American Bar Association, less than 60% of law graduates were employed in full-time, long-term jobs that required a law degree.Other graduates are trying to piece together part-time legal jobs or working out of the legal field altogether.

, CAS is used by all law schools. You send them your transcripts, letters of recommendation, and evaluation; they create a packet and send it to the law school. The service requires a fee.Register early and make sure to get your transcripts to CAS in a timely manner.

, Now is the time to draw on the relationships you have built up with faculty during your undergraduate career. Ask your professors if they can write you a strong letter of recommendation. Only follow through if that professor says “yes.”


If you didn’t build strong relationships with faculty, don’t despair. You can also ask for recommendations from present and past employers, as well as from people associated with church or volunteer organizations.
Some recommenders may need to be prompted to complete the letter. Send a friendly email reminder, or stop in to chat.

, Law schools require that you write a short statement, typically on a topic of your choosing. The statement is usually only 500 words.Follow the directions. If the school wants you to write on a specific topic, write on that topic. Also, if they give you a word limit, stick to the limit. Going over, by even a few words, can harm your chances of admission.
Feel free to write about your interest in personal injury law. However, try to use an anecdote that can explain your interest in personal injury law. For example, has a family member been injured in an accident?
You also should feel free to write about any subject that you want. You do not have to explain why you want to be a lawyer (unless the prompt specifies that you should write about that subject).

, An addendum can be a great way to explain something that looks bad in your application. A solid addendum will provide context for any information that might raise “red flags.”Red flags include criminal convictions, punishment for cheating or plagiarism, or semesters with very low grades.
An addendum might also clarify why one LSAT score is much higher than another. Remember to explain in your addendum, not make excuses.

, Only a handful of law schools have national reach. Instead, most law schools place their graduates in the local legal community, usually in small firms or local government agencies. You should therefore pick a law school in an area where you want to practice.


You should always ask any prospective law school for its job placement statistics. Over the past few years, a sea change has occurred with respect to the way schools collect job placement data. Now schools must include much more detailed information about the employment rates of recent graduates.
Pay attention to the number of students who get “full-time jobs requiring a JD” after graduation. Other employment statistics will fold in people who are working part-time or who are working in a field that doesn’t require a law degree.

, As you compare law schools, you should always have costs in the forefront of your mind. You might assume that public schools are always cheaper than private schools, but that is not always the case. The tuition for out-of-state law students is often comparable to the tuition of a private school.


If you want to move to a state and hope to qualify as an in-state resident, contact the law school’s admissions office for information.

, A great way to get hands-on legal experience while in law school is to participate in a clinic. Many law schools have clinics where students represent low-income clients while under the supervision of a faculty member. Although few law schools have personal injury law clinics, you could participate in a criminal law clinic, which could help develop your skills.


In a criminal law clinic, students often interview clients and witnesses, negotiate with prosecutors, and even appear in court to try cases before judges and juries. Criminal law clinics would thus give you relevant experience, since personal injury attorneys also engage in interviewing, negotiations, and trial work.
Some magazines or websites rank law school clinical programs. Do not get too caught up in ranking. You are unlikely to get a job because you participated in a “ranked” clinical program. Instead, ask schools about: the kinds of clinics they offer and the number of students who can take them, what kinds of tasks they do, whether they can participate in trials, and whether they can take the clinic as a 2L (or even as a 1L).

, Choosing a law school for some will be quite easy. Those who plan to stay in the area where they currently reside may only have 1 or 2 options. For others, the choice might be more difficult. In addition to costs, applicants should consider:


Curriculum. The basic curriculum for first year students is pretty much the same at any law school, but after the first year, the classes available might be very different. Look for a curriculum with electives in torts, remedies, evidence, and complex litigation.
Library and other facilities. You will likely be spending a lot of time in the library while attending law school, so be sure that the library has quality resource materials and hours that will work with your schedule.
Accreditation. You want to be sure that the law school you choose to attend is accredited by the American Bar Association (“ABA”), as you might not be able to sit for the bar examination if your school is not. To check that the law school you wish to attend is accredited, check the ABA’s ABA Approved Law Schools page.
Trial advocacy programs. More than most other lawyers, personal injury attorneys spend considerable time in the court room. Accordingly, you should look for law schools that offer trial advocacy programs. These programs teach students the ins and outs of the entire trial process, from creating effective exhibits and questioning witnesses, to delivering effective opening and closing statements. Law schools often field trial advocacy teams that compete in national competitions.
Solo practitioner incubators. Some law schools have realized that many of their students become solo practitioners. Therefore, they have created programs designed to help students hit the ground running as solos once they graduate and pass the bar. Since many personal injury lawyers work as solo practitioners, you may be interested in a school that offers an incubator program.

, These are the two most important factors in law school admissions, and schools will rely on them heavily. Because application fees can be expensive (sometimes close to $100), you will want to be selective about which schools you apply to. Look for schools where your GPA and LSAT fall near the school’s medians.


You can gauge your likelihood of gaining admission to specific schools by using the LSAC calculator. Enter your undergraduate GPA and LSAC score to see your chances.
If you have a 3.5 GPA and a 155 LSAT, then you have a 25% chance of getting into Arizona State, a 50% chance of getting into Michigan State, and a 75% chance of getting into the University of Miami.

, Applying to more than one school increases your chances of being accepted. If you don’t get into any school, then you will have to wait a year before applying.


For some great tips on completing law school applications see the University of New Mexico’s Tips on How to Make your Application as Competitive as Possible.

, Law schools generally require 90 credits or so, spread out over 3 years. Your first year will consist mostly of basic courses: torts, contracts, property, civil procedure, criminal law, and constitutional law.


Most personal injury lawyers work either as solo practitioners or in small firms of two to ten lawyers. However, in some larger law firms attorneys work in mass torts or products liability. These attorneys focus on defending or suing large corporations, often in class actions. If this is the type of personal injury work you would like to do, then you will need to finish near the top of your class.
Visit your career services office and ask what firms come onto your campus to interview. Career Services should also have information on the GPA required to be hired by these larger firms. Gathering this information can give you some idea of how well you need to do in your studies.

, Law school is stressful and isolating, and a study group is a great way to meet people. Study groups help with exam preparation, sharing notes and outlines, as well as just blowing off some steam.


If you join a study group, stick with it. No one likes people who join a group only to drop out after a month.

, Before you can become a lawyer, you have to pass law school. Your grades will also follow you around your entire career. Though the importance of grades decreases over time, poor grades could keep you locked out of jobs, at least initially.

, Many law schools allow students to begin taking electives beginning with their second semester. As a future personal injury attorney, you will want to take courses such as Advanced Torts, Evidence, Trial Advocacy, and Complex Litigation.

, An excellent addition to your legal education would be an internship with a judge, preferably one who works in civil court, where personal injury cases are brought. Look into performing an “externship” with a federal judge or a state criminal court judge. Most law schools allow externships for credit. If interested, contact your career center for more information.


As a judicial extern, you will get an up-close view of how judges decide cases, and you will understand what arguments they find persuasive and which ones they don’t. As an extern, you will research case law, draft portions of memos or bench orders, and watch oral arguments., By joining the AAJ, you can attend the summer convention for free, where you will learn the latest trial techniques.Membership costs $15 for law students.You must register online.

, During the summers you can work for attorneys as a clerk or a summer associate. You should begin looking for these opportunities in the spring semester. Larger firms will advertise through your school’s career center. However, you can also send out a copy of your resume and transcript and ask if a position is available.


You might get paid, but money should not be the primary purpose of a summer job. Instead, you should begin building your reputation. Be sure to do top-notch work, no matter how boring the assignment.
Once you graduate law school, you might not have a job. If you did good work as a summer associate, however, you can reach out to the attorney and ask for work after you graduate. You may only get piecemeal overflow work, but it can help pay the bills and give you additional experience.
Be sure to get writing experience in your summer jobs. Employers usually ask for a writing sample when you apply for a job, and it is best to have a “real world” writing sample, such as a motion or brief, than a writing assignment you did for a legal writing class in law school.

, The Multistate Professional Responsibility Examination is required to practice in all but three jurisdictions in the United States. The exam has 60 questions and tests your knowledge of legal ethics.You will take the exam in your third year of law school.

, Each state admits its own lawyers and administers its own bar exam, so check with the bar of the state where you wish to practice.They will provide you with a list of the necessary steps to take.

, Nearly every state requires that you pass a written exam. The exam typically includes an essay portion as well as a multiple choice test.The bar exam is typically offered twice a year—once during the summer (June or July) and once the winter (usually February). If you have to take the bar exam over, you have to pay each time you take it.

, Prep courses abound. They typically last several months and prepare you for both the essay and multiple choice portions of the bar exam. Costs can run up to several thousand dollars.If costs are a concern, then you can seek out old study guides published by bar prep companies. Many people sell old guides on eBay and other online retailers.

, In addition to passing the bar exam, you also need to pass a character and fitness review.

This requires filling out a detailed survey on your background.

Common problems with character and fitness include criminal convictions, financial irresponsibility (such as bankruptcy), and accusations of plagiarism. These may not completely block you from admission, but be prepared to discuss them with the character and fitness committee.
Always be honest when filling out the background survey. Often the attempt to hide something is worse than the offense in the first place.

, The bar exam is typically held over the course of 2 days. The first day consists of a multiple-choice exam covering topics such as contracts, constitutional law, criminal law, evidence, and torts.The second day, consisting of essays, is often state-specific.Expect to wait several months to receive your score. In Illinois, for example, those who take the exam in July will not receive their results until the first two weeks of October., If large- or medium-sized firms with personal injury practices come onto your campus for interviews, you might as well sign up if your grades are even somewhat competitive. Going through the interview process will help you hone your interviewing skills.


Your career services office will send out detailed requirements for participating in OCI, such as preparing a resume and ordering copies of your transcript. Be sure to follow all policies to the letter, otherwise you could be prohibited from participating in interviews.

, Smaller firms often advertise online. You can check Craigslist, job aggregators like Indeed.com, and with your state bar association, which may have a jobs board. You will be asked to forward a resume, cover letter, and writing sample, so have those ready to go.

, After taking the bar exam, you should identify attorneys whose practices you would like to learn more about. Draft a letter (not an email) and introduce yourself. Be sure to mention who gave you their name.


In the letter, explicitly state that you are not asking for a job. You will get a better response this way.
Develop a list of questions (at least five) and take notes. Be engaged.Ask the attorney if she knows anyone else you can talk to, and be sure to send a thank you note afterwards.

, If you cannot find a job after passing the bar, re-connect with attorneys you worked for during the summer or part-time during the school year. They may have overflow work for you to do, such as research assignments, court appointments, or briefing.


You can also cold call other personal injury attorneys and ask if they have any overflow work. If you do not have a job, you should be most focused on building your reputation and not be picky about how much you get paid. If you do good work for low wages (or even for free), then the attorney may come back to you with additional work.

, Even if personal injury law is your dream, you might need to take another legal job simply to pay the bills. Ideally, you could work as a criminal defense attorney. Like personal injury lawyers, criminal defense attorneys work with medical experts and get plenty of courtroom experience. You also might be employed as a transactional attorney, an insurance claims adjuster, or working as a legal research assistant.

, As your career advances, be sure to continue to raise your profile by offering continuing legal education courses, joining bar association committees, and joining national organizations like the National Association of Personal Injury Attorneys.


You can also seek board certification in personal injury law, if your state offers it. Some states, like Texas, certify attorneys in personal injury.You may have to take an exam and meet minimum practice requirements, such as practicing for a number of years and dedicating a certain percentage of your practice to personal injury law.

How to Change to Guillotine Cross in Ragnarok Online

The Guillotine Cross is a powerful physical attack-type job. It is a late-game job, and is not available until you reach Base Level 99 with another class. This page covers how to change to Guillotine Cross.

Choosing the Guillotine Cross

The Guillotine Cross is a difficult job to play, even at lower levels. To unlock it, you must first reach Base Level 99 with another class. The other class can be any physical attack-type job, such as the Assassin, the Gunner, or the tanks. However, the best job to unlock the Guillotine Cross is the cla.shiro class. The cla.shiro class is a special job only available in the Philippines, and has higher than normal Base Levels. For more information on the cla.shiro class, see our cla.shiro guide.

To change to the Guillotine Cross, you must first have a job that is at least Base Level 99. This will allow you to unlock the final job advancement, which is the Guillotine Cross.

How to Advance to Guillotine Cross

To change to Guillotine Cross, you will need to go to the Job Academy in the town of Prontera. The Job Academy is located in the northern part of the town, next to the Prontera Church. Once you are inside the Job Academy, you will need to speak with the Job Instructor. The Job Instructor will allow you to change to Guillotine Cross.

After you have chosen the Guillotine Cross, you will be given a set of starting equipment. This equipment is based on your previous job, and will be different depending on what job you changed from. For example, if you changed from the Assassin, you will start with a set of knives and a leather armor. If you changed from the Gunner, you will start with a set of pistols and a metal armor.

The vast number of styles and colors of Jordans to choose from make your options almost unlimited. One of the first ways to narrow your choices is to choose a pair based on the occasion you’re wearing it for.


If you’re planning to play a game of basketball and would like to wear Jordans, choose a pair of high tops. The shoe will cover your ankles, which helps to cushion your ankles from injuries. To ensure you’re fully protected from injuries, tie the shoe all the way up to the top.Jordans are popular form of casual wear. The low or high top versions of Jordans can be worn with jeans or shorts, and even casual skirts or dresses.;
, There are over 100 options to choose from when selecting Air Jordans.Choosing which shoe you want to wear boils down to what you do or don’t like, and what colors you’d prefer.


If you prefer a classic or original style, you can choose the first ever released pair of Jordans: the Air Jordan I. Beyond that, explore the brand’s numbered series, which includes Air Jordan I to Air Jordan XX3.
Take a look at the retro Air Jordans, which are becoming more popular now. Look also at the different silhouettes of the shoe to see which style you prefer. Women tend to prefer the silhouette of the Air Jordan IIIs for their softer, rounder shape.
Peruse collections of the Air Jordan special editions, re-releases, vintage collectables, and hybrids of various Jordan models.

, Air Jordans are known to be pretty expensive. Some people are willing and able to shell out several hundred dollars for an exclusive pair.If you have a budget, price will be a significant factor in your decision. It’s also a helpful way to narrow down your selection of Jordans to choose from.

, Jordans are meant to be a statement piece. And they don’t have to fully match what you have in your closet. The multifaceted looks of Jordans allow for you to dress from the bottom up, which means you can dress around the shoe and dress to accentuate its features.

, It’s best to wear Jordans with slim fitting jeans to allow your Jordans to stand out. Wearing baggy jeans with Jordans are not recommended, as they’ll cover and overshadow the shoe. Relaxed, slim jeans will provide a better fit for men. While skinny jeans will work fine for women.You’ll want to choose a shade of blue jeans that blends well with your Jordans. Dark blue jeans work well because the colors of your shoes will pop against the dark colored denim.
Jordans can also be paired with various shades and prints of cargo pants, and styles of shorts. Depending on the color and style of your shoe you can experiment with different, and even bold, colored pants. You can also wear camouflage or floral prints.Both low and high top Jordans work well for women wearing shorts or casual dresses.

, A pair of low-cut, neutral colored socks that fit around your ankles will pair well with your Jordans, especially if you’re wearing low tops. Jordans are worn best when they’re allowed to shine. You don’t want a distracting pair of patterned socks, or a pair of long socks extending past your ankle, to distract from your shoes

, Jordans are meant to be shown off. If you’re wearing jeans, you’ll want you to keep your shoes uncovered. You can do this by tucking the jeans into your shoe around your ankles and pulling the tongue of the shoe upwards.

, Accentuate your Jordans by blending colors from your outfit with your shoes. Jordans are meant to be the centerpiece of your outfit. Wearing too much of a bright color can pull the attention away from your Jordans.


If, for example, you’re wanting to match the red trim of your Jordans, it’s best to add a splash of red to your outfit. You could wear a scarf with red patterns, a necklace or bracelet with a red pendant, or red-rimmed shades. You could accessorize with a red hat, backpack or purse. Or wear a shirt with a red print or pattern.
It’s okay for your outfit to contain large blocks of demure colors like gray, black, dark blue or white, or camouflage print. Even if your shoes contain the same neutral color as your outfit, it won’t draw away from your Jordans. It’ll accentuate the shoe and make it a cohesive part of your outfit.

, Men can wear a t-shirt, button down, or sweatshirt. Women can wear the same, including a few more options depending on their style. If they are dressing in more feminine wear, they can wear a tank top, a shirt with a midriff, and even a dress. The colors in your top should work to accentuate your shoes, so choose either neutral colors or tops with sprinkles of bold color in the print.

, Jordans are essentially an athletic shoe, created originally for the basketball court. If you enjoy the sport, and want send the message that you know how to play even before you hit the court, wearing a pair of Jordans will help.


High top Jordans are not only stylish, but they serve the functional purpose of protecting your ankles while you’re on the court. To keep your ankles fully protected and secure, tie your shoes all the way up.
Wear athletic shorts and a loose fitting athletic shirt. Athletic wear is typically made with a breathable fabric that will keep you from becoming overheated during strenuous activity.
Select your actual size for your shirt and shorts. Men shouldn’t wear anything too large, and women shouldn’t wear anything too tight. While its possible it might interfere with your performance, an ill-fitted outfit might also detract from the look of your Jordans.

, Jordans worn off the court are worn best with casual outfits. When wearing jeans, make sure they’re fitted. For men, your jeans should be relaxed and fitted. Women can wear either relaxed and fitted, or skinny jeans.


Tuck your jeans into your shoes to keep your Jordans uncovered. Pull the tongue of the shoe upwards. And if wearing high tops, it’s not necessary for them to be tied all the way up.
Pair your jeans and Jordans with a complimenting top. Choose a top that blends well with the rest of your outfit. Depending on the weather, you could choose a fitted v-neck short-sleeved or long-sleeved t-shirt, a shirt that buttons up the front, or a sweatshirt. Women could also choose a tank-top.
You could then pair your top with a loose fitting jacket, like a jean-jacket, sweatshirt jacket, camouflage or leather jacket.

, Jeans aren’t the only type of bottoms that can be worn with Jordans. There are alternatives. You can wear either cargo pants or cargo shorts, shorts made of any type of material, and even fitted sweatpants. Women can also wear leggings.


Put together the rest of your outfit as if you’re wearing jeans. Since you’re still dressing casually, you can pair much of the same outfit choices with softer pants that you would with jeans.

, For men, wearing anything resembling formal wear with Jordans just doesn’t work. Women can create a semi-casual outfit with Jordans because they have more style choices like casual dresses and skirts. They can choose to wear either low top or high top Jordans with a slim fitting skirt or dress made from a softer material, like cotton or polyester, or even leather.

, The color combinations you choose to wear with your Jordans will either make or break your outfit. Because Jordans are meant to be the centerpiece of the outfit, it’s best to coordinate colors from the bottom up.

, For example, if your Jordans are mostly white with black trim, go for black or gray jeans or shorts. Your top could either be a mix of black and white, like a striped shirt or a white shirt with black trim or a greyscale image, or it could be a solid neutral color.

, Choose a shade of blue jeans that seems to be most complimenting to your Jordans’ color scheme. You can let the bright color in your Jordans be the focal point of your outfit by choosing a top that is a neutral color, like a light gray or white. You can also choose a neutral colored shirt that has splashes of colors, such as a shirt with a printed image containing similar colors as your shoes.

, This can be tricky if you aren’t good at pairing contrasting colors or patterns well. But if you have an eye for understanding color pallets, then you can create an entertaining outfit. It’s best to choose only one part of the outfit, aside from your Jordans, that you’d like to stand out. If you select a pair of boldly colored pants or jeans, or a pair of pants decorated with a print you admire, your shirt should be a solid, preferably neutral, color.

Sufganiyot are jelly donuts traditionally made in Israel. They are a beloved part of the Hanukkah celebration. Try your hand at making this sweet treat.

Ingredients:

- 1 cup (240 grams) all-purpose flour
- 2 tablespoons (30 grams) sugar, plus more for rolling
- 2 teaspoons (8 grams) instant yeast
- 1 teaspoon (8 grams) baking powder
- 1/2 teaspoon (4 grams) salt
- 2 large eggs, at room temperature
- 2 tablespoons (30 grams) unsalted butter, melted
- 1/2 cup (120 grams) water, at room temperature
- Jelly or jam of your choice

Steps:

1. In a large bowl, sift together the flour, sugar, instant yeast, and baking powder. Add the salt to the bowl and whisk to combine.
2. In a separate large bowl, whisk together the eggs and butter. Add the water and whisk until well combined.
3. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir until a shaggy dough begins to form.
4. Once the flour is mostly hydrated, turn the dough out onto a clean work surface and knead for 10-15 minutes. The dough should be soft, smooth, and bouncy. Form the dough into a ball.
5. Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover with plastic wrap, and let rise for 1 hour.
6. Punch down the dough and turn it out onto a lightly floured work surface. Knead for another minute or so to get any remaining air bubbles out.
7. Let the dough rest for 5 minutes.
8. Roll the dough out to a thickness of 1/2 inch. Cut out as many circles as possible, Re-rolling the dough as needed.
9. Place the circles on a lightly floured baking sheet. Cover with a clean kitchen towel and let rise for 30 minutes.
10. Fill a large pot with oil and heat it to 375 degrees Fahrenheit. Set up a wire cooling rack over a baking sheet to catch any drips.
11. Carefully add 2-3 donuts at a time to the hot oil. Fry for 1 minute on each side.
12. Drain the donuts on the cooling rack. Repeat with the remaining donuts.
13. Let the donuts cool for a few minutes, then fill a pastry bag with jelly and inject each donut with 1-2 tablespoons of jelly.
14. Roll the donuts in sugar and serve immediately.

How to Make Garden Crafts with Kids

There are many different garden crafts that you can make with your kids. Most of these crafts involve using various different materials that you would likely already have around the house. By using these everyday materials, kids can learn how to be more creative and use things from around the house to make fun and easy garden crafts. There are a wide variety of different garden crafts for kids to make, and many of these ideas will also help kids to learn about different flowers and plants, as well as how to grow and take care of them.

One of the most common garden crafts that kids can make are different types of garden markers. Garden markers are used to identify different flowers and plants in your garden, and kids can make them out of many different materials. Some ideas include making them out of different types of paper, wooden sticks, plastic spoons, and many other items. These garden markers can be as simple or as fancy as you want them to be.

Another fun craft that kids can make for the garden are decorative flower pots. Flower pots can easily be decorated by kids using different types of paint, stickers, and other decorative items. If you want to get really creative, you can even help your kids to create flower pot people by using different materials for the faces, arms, and legs.

When it comes to garden crafts, kids can also make many different types of hanging and windchimes. There are many different ways to make these, but they are usually made out of items such as plastic spoons, paper plates, and popsicle sticks. Kids can easily turn these items into fun and decorative windchimes and hanging garden art.

Kids can also make different types of bird feeders for the garden. Again, there are many different ways to make these, and they can be made out of a variety of different materials. Some ideas include making bird feeders out of wooden poles, paper plates, and even recycled plastic water bottles.

There are many other garden crafts that kids can make, so use your imagination and help your kids to get creative. These garden crafts can be a fun way for kids to learn about different types of plants and flowers, as well as how to take care of them.

How to Make a Paper Helicopter (Origami)

An origami helicopter is a classic childhood craft. Learn how to make a paper helicopter with these step-by-step instructions.

What You'll Need

piece of paper
pen
pencil
 Scotch Adhesive Putty
paper clip

How to Make a Paper Helicopter (Origami)

1. Start with a square piece of paper.

2. Fold the paper in half.

3. Fold the paper in half again, so that the corners meet in the center.

4. Use a pen or pencil to draw a line down the center of the paper.

5. Cut along the line you just drew.

6. Now you should have two identical pieces of paper.

7. Fold one of the pieces of paper in half, and then fold it in half again.

8. Use a pen or pencil to draw a line down the center of the paper, from the top to the bottom.

9. Cut along the line you just drew.

10. Now you should have four identical pieces of paper.

11. Take one of the pieces of paper and fold it in half.

12. Then fold it in half again.

13. Use a pen or pencil to draw a line down the center of the paper, from the top to the bottom.

14. Cut along the line you just drew.

15. Now you should have eight identical pieces of paper.

How to Drive a Car

Driving a car is a simple process, but it does require some basic knowledge and skill. This article will cover the steps you need to take in order to drive a car.

First, you need to know how to start the car. This will involve placing your key in the ignition, which is usually located behind the steering wheel. You will then need to turn the key in order to start the car.

Once the car is running, you will need to place your seatbelt on. This is a legal requirement in most states, so it is important to always wear your seatbelt when driving.

Next, you will need to put the car in gear. This will involve using the gearstick, which is usually located between the two front seats, to put the car into either first gear or reverse.

When the car is in gear, you will need to press down on the accelerator in order to move the car. The accelerator is usually located on the right side of the steering wheel.

As you press down on the accelerator, you will need to steer the car in the direction you want it to go. This will involve using the steering wheel, which is located in front of you, to turn the car.

When you want to stop the car, you will need to take your foot off the accelerator and press down on the brake. The brake is usually located on the left side of the steering wheel.

Finally, when you want to park the car, you will need to use the gearstick to put the car into reverse. You will then need to back the car into the parking spot, being careful to avoid any obstacles or other cars. Once the car is parked, you will need to put the car into first gear and then drive forward again.
